projects.title: LLM Legal Document Analyzer
projects.short_description: GPT-4o powered application that automates analysis of Master Service Agreements and Order Forms, eliminating hours of manual legal review.
projects.long_description: Designed and built an enterprise-grade LLM application using GPT-4o, OCR via Docling, and advanced prompt engineering to automatically parse and analyze complex legal documents. The system extracts key clauses, identifies risk areas, and produces structured summaries — replacing a manual process that previously took hours per contract.
projects.impact: Eliminated hours of manual legal review per contract

projects.title: S-BERT Procurement Clustering
projects.short_description: NLP clustering model analyzing 2M+ purchase orders across two procurement branches for a leading US automotive company — surfaced millions in duplicate spend.
projects.long_description: Built a sentence-transformer based clustering pipeline using S-BERT and ChromaDB to analyze over two million purchase order line items. The model identified semantically similar orders across two separate procurement branches that were causing duplicate spend. Results were surfaced in the Celonis platform for executive review and remediation.
projects.impact: Identified millions in duplicate purchase orders

projects.title: Duplicate Invoice Detection
projects.short_description: Fuzzy matching algorithm deployed across enterprise AP workflows to detect and recover $200K in duplicate invoice payments.
projects.long_description: Designed and deployed a fuzzy matching system to detect near-duplicate invoice payments across a large enterprise accounts payable dataset. The algorithm accounts for typographic variance, partial matches, and inconsistent vendor naming — enabling the finance team to identify and recover payments that traditional exact-match queries would miss.

projects.title: Retail Prescription Fulfillment Analytics
projects.short_description: Foundational analytics framework for a leading pharmaceutical distributor — identified $50M+ in fulfillment and accounts receivable inefficiencies.
projects.long_description: Led the full analytics engagement for one of the largest pharmaceutical distributors in the US. Built the foundational data model, KPI framework, and process mining dashboards in Celonis using Python and SQL. Identified targeted bottlenecks in fulfillment workflows and AR processes, enabling the client to capture and communicate significant realized value.

projects.title: Portfolio RAG Chatbot
projects.short_description: Full RAG pipeline using FastAPI, LangChain, Ollama (local LLM), ChromaDB, and optional Google API tools (Gmail + Calendar) — the AI agent powering this portfolio's upcoming chat feature.
projects.long_description: Built a production-grade retrieval-augmented generation system. The backend uses FastAPI with a LangChain agent loop that decides when to invoke tools (email, calendar scheduling) via JSON parsing. ChromaDB stores vector embeddings of professional profile data. The LLM (Gemma3:1b via Ollama) answers questions about experience and projects, or calls Google APIs when needed. Designed for full offline operation with graceful fallback when APIs are unavailable.
projects.impact: Conversational AI interface for portfolio exploration

projects.title: RockSteady — Strategic AI Agent
projects.short_description: Local strategic reasoning agent built with Python and Ollama — optimized for resource-constrained devices (8GB RAM). Runs fully offline with sliding window conversation memory.
projects.long_description: RockSteady is a strategic assistant agent framework designed to run on consumer hardware. It uses Ollama for local LLM inference (Mistral 7B, Neural-Chat, Orca-Mini, TinyLLaMA) and implements sliding window conversation memory capped at 20 messages. The agent supports custom memory backends, tool integration, and configurable reasoning temperature. A Pydantic-based settings system makes it easy to swap models and tune behavior without code changes.
projects.impact: Fully offline strategic AI agent, 40% faster than BERT-based alternatives

projects.title: StudyStreak — Habit Tracker
projects.short_description: React + Vite study habit tracker with streak rings, 30-day heatmap, course CRUD, assignment calendar, stats charts, and milestone confetti celebrations.
projects.long_description: StudyStreak is a fully client-side React application for maintaining study habits. Features include a visual streak ring indicator, daily check-in system, course/subject management with progress tracking, calendar view, stats dashboard built with Recharts, and milestone celebrations using canvas-confetti. All state is persisted in localStorage via a structured key system — no backend required.
projects.impact: Full-featured habit tracking app — zero backend, fully offline

projects.title: Multi-Label Hackathon Project Classifier
projects.short_description: DistilBERT-based multi-label classifier trained on 10,452 hackathon projects scraped from Devpost — categorizes projects into 5 prize domains with 80%+ accuracy after threshold tuning.
projects.long_description: Academic NLP project (COMP590) classifying hackathon projects into 5 prize categories: Social Impact, Tech & Development, Data, Business & Finance, and Health & Lifestyle. Dataset: 10,452 projects scraped from Devpost, with 154 prize categories bucketed into 5 binary labels. Compared DistilBERT fine-tuning against baselines (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, SVM). DistilBERT achieved ~71% F1 before threshold tuning, 80%+ after. Used 5-fold cross-validation and 80/20 train/test split.
projects.impact: 80%+ accuracy after threshold tuning on 10K+ project dataset

projects.title: Knewsfeed — News Aggregator
projects.short_description: Full-stack news aggregation web app with Puppeteer web scraping, Cheerio HTML parsing, Express REST API backend, and React frontend.
projects.long_description: Knewsfeed is a full-stack news aggregation application. The backend uses Node.js and Express with Puppeteer for headless browser automation and Cheerio for HTML parsing to scrape and aggregate news articles from multiple sources in real time. The React frontend (Bootstrap 5) presents the aggregated feed with a clean, responsive UI.
projects.impact: Real-time multi-source news aggregation with headless browser scraping

projects.title: LibApp — AI-Powered Library System
projects.short_description: Full-stack library management app with Claude AI and OpenAI integration, TypeScript backend, React frontend, and vector database for intelligent book discovery.
projects.long_description: LibApp combines traditional book management with AI agent capabilities. The TypeScript/Node.js backend (Express) integrates both the Anthropic Claude SDK and OpenAI SDK for intelligent features, with a vector database layer for semantic book search and recommendations. The React/Vite frontend uses TailwindCSS and Lucide React for a modern UI. Goal tracking and MongoDB persistence round out the feature set.
projects.impact: AI-enhanced library management with semantic search capabilities

projects.title: Nicholas Construction — Client CRM
projects.short_description: Full-stack CRM web app for a construction company with React + TypeScript frontend, Express/MongoDB backend, email automation via Resend, and Docker deployment.
projects.long_description: A full-stack CRM system built for a real construction company. The main frontend is built with React, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS, and React Router v6, while the Express/Node.js backend uses Mongoose for MongoDB integration. Email communication is handled through the Resend API. Docker containerization enables easy deployment. A secondary React client handles email-focused UI flows.
projects.impact: Production CRM deployed for a real construction business client

projects.title: Virtual Supply Chain Simulator
projects.short_description: Interactive supply chain simulation and visualization dashboard built with React 19, Recharts, and TailwindCSS — models real-time operational metrics.
projects.long_description: An educational and business simulation tool that models supply chain operations with real-time data visualization. Built with React 19 (cutting-edge), Recharts for supply chain metric charts, and Lucide React for iconography. The simulation engine models inventory, fulfillment, and logistics flows, presenting interactive dashboards for analysis.
projects.impact: Interactive supply chain modeling and analytics dashboard

projects.title: High-Speed Rail Mobile App API
projects.short_description: REST API powering the US's first high-speed rail company's iOS and Android application — built with NestJS and AWS.
projects.long_description: Developed and debugged production REST API endpoints for a client application serving the US's first high-speed rail company. Built on NestJS and TypeScript with AWS Lambda, EC2, and S3 as the infrastructure layer. Also automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and YAML, significantly improving deployment velocity and test coverage.
projects.impact: Production launch across iOS and Android

projects.title: humanID Developer Console
projects.short_description: Full-stack revamp of humanID's developer console in React and Node.js — drove a 20% increase in web traffic and improved third-party developer experience.
projects.long_description: Redesigned and rebuilt the developer console for humanID, an open-source anonymous authentication project. Migrated the frontend to React.js with a modernized UX, backed by a Node.js API layer. The updated console significantly improved the onboarding experience for third-party developers integrating humanID into their apps, contributing to a 20% uplift in web traffic.

projects.title: Provenance — Article Collection System
projects.short_description: Kotlin/Gradle microservice with Netflix Conductor-style architecture that ingests InfoQ articles via RSS, processes them through background workers, and exposes a REST API.
projects.long_description: Provenance is a data collection and article management system following a Conductor-esque workflow architecture. Written in Kotlin, it processes InfoQ RSS feeds through a background worker pattern, maps RSS results to structured article collections, and exposes a REST API (GET /articles) that returns all ingested articles as JSON. Deployed via Docker and Heroku (Procfile included). Uses Jackson for serialization, JUnit + Mockito for testing.
projects.impact: Background-worker RSS ingestion pipeline with REST API delivery

projects.title: Othello — Python AI Board Game
projects.short_description: Python implementation of Othello (Reversi) with an AI opponent, turtle graphics GUI, full game logic including legal move validation and tile flipping, and comprehensive unit tests.
projects.long_description: A complete Othello game implementation in Python using the turtle graphics library for the GUI. Features include an 8x8 board, human vs. computer gameplay, full legal move validation, tile-flipping mechanics, score calculation, and winner determination. Includes a comprehensive unit test suite (CS5001 academic project). Black (human) plays first; the computer plays white.
projects.impact: Fully playable Othello with AI opponent and comprehensive test suite

projects.title: Bag Puncher — Android Game
projects.short_description: Android mobile game built in Java with custom graphics, punching mechanics, combo animations, and multiple game modes — packaged with Gradle and Android Studio.
projects.long_description: A native Android mobile game developed in Java using Android Studio and the full Android SDK/Jetpack component stack. Features custom drawable assets (boxing gloves, punching bag, background), hit marker animations, scale/punch animations, combo scoring windows, and multiple game screens. Built with Gradle multi-module setup for clean separation of app and library concerns.
projects.impact: Native Android mobile game with custom animations and gameplay mechanics

projects.title: Product Co-Purchase Clustering
projects.short_description: ML clustering model identifying frequently co-purchased products for AllPeople Marketplace — drove measurable sales growth across 17 key SKUs.
projects.long_description: Developed a market basket analysis and clustering model to identify products frequently purchased together in AllPeople's marketplace dataset. The model enabled the marketing team to deploy targeted bundling and promotional strategies, resulting in measurable sales uplift across 17 key product SKUs.
